commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=8a90ac85da0cb7f0271979101ef6dd8582f8d3cb)
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves the existing `themeScript` from the root document `<head>` into the first `<body>` child and adds `AGENTS.md` plus `opencode.json` instructions.

Reproducibility: no. Source inspection confirms current main renders the inline theme script inside `<head>` after `HeadContent`, but I did not run a browser/SSR reproduction that shows the hydration warning.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor proof is missing and the added agent policy/config needs maintainer acceptance, cleanup, or a split before this branch should merge.

target.title: fix: move theme script from <head> to <body> to prevent SSR hydration mismatch
target.body:
TanStack Start manages `<head>` during SSR via `HeadContent`. Having an inline `<script>` tag as a sibling of `HeadContent` causes the SSR output to diverge from the client render, producing a hydration mismatch:

```
<head>
  <HeadContent>
+   <script suppressHydrationWarning={true}>
-   {"\n"}
```

Fix: place the theme script as the first child of `<body>` instead of inside `<head>`. Inline scripts in `<body>` execute synchronously before the rest of the DOM is processed, so theme flash prevention (FOUC) is preserved.

Also adds `AGENTS.md` with project stack, commands, conventions, and the script-in-body rule for future AI agents working on this codebase.

Changes:
- `src/routes/__root.tsx`: move `<script>` from `<head>` to first child of `<body>`
- `AGENTS.md`: project reference for AI agents (stack, commands, style, architecture, testing, env vars, quirks)
- `opencode.json`: add `AGENTS.md` to instructions list
target.author: gonzalomld

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
